name: web-verification-localhost
prompt: localhost:3000 열어서 메인 페이지가 로드되는지 확인하고 스크린샷 찍어줘

assertions.text: Agent detects web platform from 'localhost:3000' signal without asking
Agent checks node --version and npx playwright --version before any other command
Agent writes a Playwright script to navigate to localhost:3000
If connection refused: agent reports the error and stops without starting a dev server
Agent does NOT run npm start, npm run dev, or any command to start a server
Final output uses the Simulator Verification Report template structure
